scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/backend run build && npm --workspace apps/worker run build && npm --workspace apps/frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run db:generate && npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/backend run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/worker run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/frontend run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck
